title: Wan 2.2 Animate
description: Animate a character image with a driving video using Wan 2.2 Animate 14B (ComfyUI). Inputs pulled from R2, output uploaded back to R2 with audio.

input.name: R2 / S3 Endpoint URL
input.description: R2 endpoint (e.g. https://<account-id>.r2.cloudflarestorage.com). Required — used for both input downloads and output uploads.

input.name: R2 Access Key ID
input.description: R2 API token access key. Required.

input.name: R2 Output Bucket
input.description: Bucket the final -audio.mp4 is uploaded to. Required.

input.name: R2 Input Bucket (optional)
input.description: Bucket the reference image + driving video are fetched from. Defaults to R2_BUCKET_NAME if unset.

input.name: Comfy.org API Key
input.description: Optional Comfy.org API key for API Nodes.

input.name: Serve API Locally (dev)
input.description: Dev only: run a local test API on 0.0.0.0.

input.name: ComfyUI Log Level
input.description: Log level for ComfyUI (DEBUG, INFO, WARNING, ERROR, CRITICAL).

input.name: Websocket Reconnect Attempts
input.description: How many times to retry if the WS drops mid-job.

input.name: Websocket Trace
input.description: Detailed frame-level WS logs (noisy, debug only).

input.name: Refresh Worker
input.description: Restart the worker after each job for a clean state.

input.name: Network Volume Debug
input.description: Log network-volume diagnostics at the start of each job.
